ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_ended" TEXT /* Date at the end of the quarter */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the quarter ended */,
  "quarter_start" TEXT /* Date at the start of the quarter */,
  "quarter_number" INTEGER /* Number of the quarter (1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code of the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or division the state belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (population per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarter */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "deaths_10k_pop" REAL /* Number of deaths per 10,000 population */,
  "cases_10k_pop" REAL /* Number of cases per 10,000 population */,
  "tests_10k_pop" REAL /* Number of tests per 10,000 population */,
  "positivity_pct" REAL /* Positivity rate (percentage of tests that are positive) */,
  "case_fatality_pct" REAL /* Case fatality rate (percentage of cases that result in death) */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases (cases - (deaths + recovered)) */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Testing rate (number of tests per 1,000 population) */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate (percentage of the population vaccinated) */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate (number of hospitalizations per 10,000 population) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data version (draft, published, deprecated) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, research) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)
